summary: Verstappen hunts redemption at Spa after consecutive high-speed crashes force Red Bull into a defensive wing setup change, while Mercedes' Antonelli signals a breakthrough weekend after topping Friday practice. McLaren's Norris faces a 10-place grid penalty from a power unit breach, handing rivals a golden opportunity to capitalize on the Brit's compromised starting position. A strong result for Verstappen could stabilize Red Bull's championship momentum, but any slip-up allows Norris and McLaren to claw back ground despite the grid handicap.
